summary: Fixing NDCG metric IDCG calculation to use expected relevant doc count instead of retrieved doc count

fields.summary: Fixing NDCG metric IDCG calculation to use expected relevant doc count instead of retrieved doc count

content:
type: ANSWER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: My change only touches the IDCG block in NDCG.compute: removed 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' and changed the idcg sum to iterate 'range(1, len(expected_ids) + 1)' instead of 'range(1, ideal_length + 1)'. DCG calc and rest of the method untouched - should merge cleanly with your relevance_scores additions as long as you rebase the idcg loop bound onto len(expected_ids) instead of the old ideal_length/min() logic.
